messages.content:
Create a retrieval-oriented summary for this section of a document.
Focus on what questions this section can answer: topics, entities, dates,
definitions, procedures, claims, tables, figures, metrics, and evidence types.
Do not invent facts. Return only the summary text.

Section metadata:
{
  "node_id": "0155",
  "title": "2025年度实力出海游戏",
  "page_index": 1,
  "page_range": "1"
}

Section text:
## 2025年度实力出海游戏

2025 Premier Chinese-developed Mobile Games in Global Markets

message.content: This section functions as a title/header for a list or report on top-performing Chinese-developed mobile games in international markets. It can answer retrieval queries regarding the primary topic (premier Chinese mobile games expanding globally), the target year (2025), and the geographic/market scope (global markets). As a heading-only section, it contains no specific game titles, developer names, metrics, tables, figures, procedures, definitions, claims, or evidentiary data, and serves solely to introduce the subsequent content.
